# PWA Verification Checklist

Complete manual verification checklist for PWA readiness. Use alongside automated script.

## Manifest (manifest.json)

- [ ] File exists at `public/manifest.json`
- [ ] Valid JSON (no syntax errors)
- [ ] **name** field: Full app name (Thai: "Kum Sud - คุ้มสุด")
- [ ] **short_name** field: ≤12 characters ("Kum Sud")
- [ ] **description** field: Clear purpose
- [ ] **start_url** field: Set to `"/"`
- [ ] **scope** field: Set to `"/"`
- [ ] **display** field: Set to `"standalone"` (hides browser UI)
- [ ] **orientation** field: Set to `"portrait-primary"` (mobile-first)
- [ ] **theme_color** field: Valid CSS color matching app theme
- [ ] **background_color** field: Valid CSS color for splash screen
- [ ] **categories** field: Includes relevant categories (e.g., `["shopping", "utilities"]`)
- [ ] **lang** field: Set to `"th"` (Thai)
- [ ] **icons** array has at least 2 entries:
  - [ ] One with `"purpose": "any"` (standard icon)
  - [ ] One with `"purpose": "maskable"` (adaptive icon)
- [ ] Each icon entry has:
  - [ ] **src**: Valid path to icon file
  - [ ] **sizes**: Exact dimensions (e.g., "192x192")
  - [ ] **type**: "image/png" (or "image/svg+xml")
  - [ ] **purpose**: Either "any" or "maskable"

## Icons & Assets

### Standard Icons (purpose: "any")
- [ ] `public/pwa-64x64.png` exists
  - [ ] 64×64 pixels
  - [ ] PNG format, RGB mode (no transparency)
  - [ ] File size < 5KB
- [ ] `public/pwa-192x192.png` exists
  - [ ] 192×192 pixels
  - [ ] PNG format, RGB mode
  - [ ] File size < 20KB
- [ ] `public/pwa-512x512.png` exists
  - [ ] 512×512 pixels
  - [ ] PNG format, RGB mode
  - [ ] File size < 100KB

### Maskable Icon
- [ ] `public/maskable-icon-512x512.png` exists
  - [ ] 512×512 pixels
  - [ ] PNG format, RGB mode
  - [ ] Safe zone: Important content in center 80% (outer 20% may be clipped by OS)
  - [ ] File size < 100KB

### Apple Touch Icon
- [ ] `public/apple-touch-icon-180x180.png` exists
  - [ ] 180×180 pixels
  - [ ] PNG format, RGB mode (no transparency)
  - [ ] File size < 15KB

### Other Assets
- [ ] `public/favicon.ico` exists (or `.svg` version)
- [ ] `public/robots.txt` exists (standard for web crawlers)

## index.html Configuration

- [ ] `<link rel="manifest" href="/manifest.json" />` in `<head>`
- [ ] `<meta name="theme-color" content="#ffffff" />` in `<head>` (matches manifest.theme_color)
- [ ] `<meta name="description" content="..." />` in `<head>` (matches manifest.description)
- [ ] `<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />` present
- [ ] `<link rel="apple-touch-icon" href="/apple-touch-icon-180x180.png" sizes="180x180" />` in `<head>`
- [ ] `<link rel="mask-icon" href="/maskable-icon-512x512.png" color="#ffffff" />` in `<head>` (optional, for Safari)
- [ ] Favicon linked: `<link rel="icon" type="image/svg+xml" href="/favicon.svg" />` or `.ico`

## Service Worker Implementation

- [ ] File exists at `public/sw.js` (not nested in subdirectory)
- [ ] Registered in `src/main.js`:
  ```javascript
  if ('serviceWorker' in navigator) {
    navigator.serviceWorker.register('/sw.js')
  }
  ```

### SW Structure
- [ ] **Install event**: Pre-caches essential assets
  - [ ] Defines `CACHE_NAME` with version
  - [ ] Lists all assets in `ASSETS_TO_CACHE`
  - [ ] Calls `self.skipWaiting()` after cache population
- [ ] **Activate event**: Cleans old caches
  - [ ] Deletes caches not matching current `CACHE_NAME`
  - [ ] Calls `self.clients.claim()` to control all pages immediately
- [ ] **Fetch event**: Implements caching strategy
  - [ ] Network-first for HTML (`index.html`, `/`)
  - [ ] Cache-first for assets (JS, CSS, images)
  - [ ] Graceful fallback on network failure

### Required Assets in Cache
- [ ] `/` (root)
- [ ] `/index.html`
- [ ] `/manifest.json`
- [ ] App bundle files (auto-generated by Vite)
- [ ] All referenced icons from `ASSETS_TO_CACHE`

## Offline Functionality

- [ ] App loads without network (test with DevTools Offline mode)
- [ ] All UI elements display (no missing styles/images)
- [ ] Navigation works (page doesn't crash)
- [ ] Data inputs persist (local state preserved)
- [ ] Graceful degradation if external APIs unreachable

## Installation & Home Screen

### Android (Chrome)
- [ ] Browser shows install prompt (banner or menu option)
- [ ] Clicking install adds app to home screen
- [ ] Installed app icon matches maskable icon (not square crop)
- [ ] Tapping home screen icon opens app full-screen
- [ ] App appears in system task switcher

### iOS (Safari)
- [ ] Safari Share menu includes "Add to Home Screen" option
- [ ] Installed app icon shows (matches apple-touch-icon)
- [ ] Tapping home screen icon opens app full-screen
- [ ] No Safari UI visible (standalone mode)
- [ ] Status bar visible at top (system default)

### Install Criteria Met
- [ ] ✓ HTTPS enabled (or localhost for dev)
- [ ] ✓ Valid manifest.json
- [ ] ✓ Service Worker active
- [ ] ✓ At least 192×192 icon in manifest
- [ ] ✓ `display: standalone`
- [ ] ✓ `start_url` defined
- [ ] ✓ App not already installed (first-time only)

## DevTools Verification

### Application > Manifest Tab
- [ ] No red error messages
- [ ] No yellow warnings
- [ ] All icons show green checkmarks (loaded successfully)
- [ ] App identity section shows name/short_name
- [ ] Install button appears (if installable)

### Application > Service Workers Tab
- [ ] Service Worker shows as "activated and running"
- [ ] Scope matches start_url (e.g., `/`)
- [ ] Fetch events logged on page load

### Application > Cache Storage Tab
- [ ] Cache named `kumsud-vX` (where X is version) exists
- [ ] Cache contains all URLs from `ASSETS_TO_CACHE`
- [ ] Cache size < 50MB (well below device limits)

### Application > Storage Tab
- [ ] Total storage used: < 10MB (check quota)
- [ ] No quota warnings

### Network Tab > Offline Mode
- [ ] Check "Offline" checkbox
- [ ] Reload page (Ctrl+R)
- [ ] Page loads from cache (status: 200 OK with service worker indicator)
- [ ] All assets cached (no red X failures)
- [ ] Uncheck Offline to restore network

## Performance Validation

- [ ] Build completes without errors: `pnpm build`
- [ ] No build warnings related to PWA assets
- [ ] Bundle size measured:
  - [ ] `dist/index.html` < 50KB
  - [ ] Main JS bundle < 200KB gzipped
  - [ ] Total assets < 500KB gzipped
- [ ] Load time on 3G acceptable (< 3 seconds first load)
- [ ] Core Vitals acceptable:
  - [ ] LCP (Largest Contentful Paint) < 2.5s
  - [ ] FID (First Input Delay) < 100ms
  - [ ] CLS (Cumulative Layout Shift) < 0.1

## Update & Versioning

- [ ] **Before deploying new version**:
  - [ ] Increment version in `package.json`
  - [ ] Update `CACHE_NAME` in `public/sw.js` (e.g., `v1` → `v2`)
  - [ ] Add/remove entries from `ASSETS_TO_CACHE` if assets changed
  - [ ] Run `pnpm release` to generate CHANGELOG

- [ ] **After deployment**:
  - [ ] Old service worker unregisters on next user visit
  - [ ] Old cache cleaned on activate
  - [ ] User sees new version on refresh (or app restart)

## Browser Compatibility

- [ ] **Chrome 90+**: Full PWA support ✓
- [ ] **Safari 14+ (iOS 14+)**: Install support ✓ (limited API support)
- [ ] **Firefox 92+**: PWA support ✓
- [ ] **Edge 90+**: Full PWA support ✓
- [ ] **Samsung Internet 14+**: Full PWA support ✓

## Troubleshooting

### App Won't Install
1. [ ] Verify HTTPS enabled (or localhost for dev)
2. [ ] Check manifest.json is valid JSON (copy to jq, run `jq . manifest.json`)
3. [ ] Verify icon files exist and are accessible
4. [ ] Ensure `display: "standalone"` in manifest
5. [ ] Check Service Worker is active (DevTools > Service Workers)
6. [ ] DevTools > Manifest tab: read error messages
7. [ ] Try incognito mode (disable extensions)

### Service Worker Not Updating
1. [ ] Increment `CACHE_NAME` version in `public/sw.js`
2. [ ] DevTools > Service Workers tab: Click "Unregister"
3. [ ] Hard-refresh (Cmd+Shift+R on Mac, Ctrl+Shift+R on Windows)
4. [ ] Wait 5-10 seconds for new SW to register
5. [ ] Check DevTools > Application > Cache Storage for new version

### Offline Mode Not Working
1. [ ] Ensure `/index.html` in `ASSETS_TO_CACHE`
2. [ ] Verify SW fetch handler includes HTML document check
3. [ ] Check cache size < 50MB (DevTools > Storage)
4. [ ] Load page once online first (to populate cache)
5. [ ] Test offline mode in DevTools > Network tab (check "Offline")

### Icons Missing on Home Screen
1. [ ] Verify `maskable-icon-512x512.png` exists and is valid PNG
2. [ ] Check safe zone: important content in center 80%
3. [ ] Ensure no transparency in PNG (must be RGB mode)
4. [ ] Rebuild manifest.json if icons changed
5. [ ] Uninstall app, clear cache, reinstall
6. [ ] Try on a fresh Android device

### Update Notification Not Showing
1. [ ] Ensure SW registration includes update event listener (in `main.js`)
2. [ ] Check SW version bumped (CACHE_NAME incremented)
3. [ ] Verify new SW file deployed to server
4. [ ] Test: Deploy new SW version, hard-refresh client
5. [ ] DevTools > Console should log update messages

---

**Deployment Readiness**: All items checked ✓ = Ready for production release
